title: Need some suggestions
body:
I have Iron Deficiency Anaemia from childhood. 3 years ago, I started having GERD symptoms so I can't take Iron pills. So I am stuck with being Iron Deficiency Anaemic. I have had endoscop, had just esophagitis . Now I have blood in my stools, So I had consultation from two doctors, 1 suggested me colonoscopy and the one whom I am going to from last 3 years recommended me sigmoidoscopy. 
Now I have 2 questions. 

1. I want to go to a doctor who recommended sigmoidoscopy not colonoscopy as blood is bright red so no need of colonoscopy, right? Nothing anything like black stool. Am I right here? 

2. I don't want any scope at all, a doctor once told me that these scopes even after wash give you viruses like Hepatitis C and HIV, the standard of washing here is not that good. So is there any other non invasive and risk free test like CT scan or MRI? Atleast anoscope or rectoscope seems less disease spreading. Guide me here too

Thanks
